subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-04-13
subcodes.first_line: Greed and avarice are ingrained in human nature. However, divine teachings will change these attributes.
subcodes.first_line_orig: حرص و طمع مخمر در طبیعت انسانی است ولکن تربیت الهی این صفات را تغییر میدهد
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @Manifestation of God as educator, @suffering and imprisonment, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world
